key_improvements: Seller disclosure hard guard (Johnson v. Davis)
remaining_blockers: CRITICAL: No attorney retained (architecture requires one but none engaged)
CRITICAL: Zero market validation (no interviews, no transactions)
MEDIUM: 3 negotiation skills still have advisory language
key_insight: The team did exactly what good founders do after tough feedback. Regulatory risk moved from 1.5 to 6.5. But the system hardcodes attorneyReviewRequired=true with attorneyReviewCompleted=false and no mechanism to flip it. The architecture is now investable-quality — funding conditional on closing the gap between 'requires attorney' and 'has attorney.'
